ddls:
CREATE TABLE "notable_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notable location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the notable location */,
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Classification or type of notable location (foreign key to genuses table) */,
  "noted_in" INTEGER /* Reference to the historical record where the location was first noted (foreign key to historical_records table) */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Address of the notable location (foreign key to addresses table) */,
  "proximity_id" INTEGER /* Proximity to other notable locations (foreign key to proximities table) */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Area where the notable location is situated (foreign key to areas table) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the notable location */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the notable location */,
  "ownership" TEXT /* Current ownership information */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the notable location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the notable location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notable location was first recorded in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notable location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notable_locations_proximity_id FOREIGN KEY ("proximity_id") REFERENCES proximities ("proximity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notable_locations_noted_in FOREIGN KEY ("noted_in") REFERENCES historical_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notable_locations_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notable_locations_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notable_locations_genus_id FOREIGN KEY ("genus_id") REFERENCES genuses ("genus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genuses" (
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genus */,
  "genus_name" TEXT /* Name of the genus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genus */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon or image representing the genus */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the genus was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the genus was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "record_name" TEXT /* Name of the historical record */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the historical record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the historical record was created */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the historical record */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL to a digital copy of the historical record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the historical record was first recorded in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the historical record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "address_name" TEXT /* Name of the address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street name of the address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the address was first recorded in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the address was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proximities" (
  "proximity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proximity */,
  "proximity_name" TEXT /* Name of the proximity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the proximity */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance in meters to the nearest notable location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the proximity was first recorded in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the proximity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proximity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of area */,
  "area_size" TEXT /* Size of the area in square meters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the area was first recorded in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the area was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notable location being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the update was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the update record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_updates_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES notable_locations ("location_id")
)
